condition.expression: ((((((LENGTH(SUBJECT_ID)) = 8) AND ((NOT (STUDY_ID = 'C5041010')) OR (STUDY_ID IS NULL))) AND ((LENGTH(CAST((REGEXP_SUBSTR(SUBJECT_ID, '\\d*')) AS STRING))) > 0)) AND (NOT ((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJECT_ID), '')) LIKE (CONCAT(LOWER('0'), '%'))))) AND (NOT ((coalesce(LOWER(SUBJECT_ID), '')) LIKE (CONCAT(LOWER('999'), '%')))))
